{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240141035FDABF4F71FC7591C496"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580269704344978201","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常期待下文！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764923987,"group_id":"7579564334972406809","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3DxuukHzFMpW5Pc4fySljw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110574272848","user_name":"红尘游客0307"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110574272848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579564334972406809","book_info":{"abstract":"仙神博弈，视人为刍狗，欲将人族“黄金一代”，尽数填入那冰冷的封神榜！
我，伯邑考，前世枉死的西岐世子、有名无实的傀儡帝君！自悟“北极御星术”，悍然打破“封神后不可修行”的天道铁律！
今生重活，誓要做人族最硬的脊梁！这一世，我聚西岐锐士、集殷商悍将，收巨人、联天庭，汇天下英豪于彀中！誓以凡人之躯，向神明亮剑！
当虚空破碎，万妖入侵。我伯邑考，当以紫微之名，为人族——逆天改命！
大战中，人族以血肉筑长城，自证伟大！
那一曲战歌响彻诸天万界：“天上北极星，地下北辰关。万古长空星不灭，斩将宝刀血犹腥！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8367d13ef27c8a83767e81d810af8ec5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"gxhg即修行","author_id":"","book_id":"7579564334972406809","book_name":"重生封神：紫微临凡！吾誓不低头","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579564626560434713","read_count":"215","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"496917"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"218","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,重生,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8367d13ef27c8a83767e81d810af8ec5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471663&x-signature=B8DMx7gUqCUj%2Bb2jB3IMHxeZpDs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3329770196054468","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240141035FDABF4F71FC7591C496"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41分钟后点评"},"sta
